name: 30" Large Phoenix Palm Artificial Plant - Threshold™
description:
Make your living space more warm and refreshing with this Large Phoenix Palm Artificial Plant from Threshold™. The artificial arrangement showcases large phoenix palm plant arranged together to bring a lovely, natural look to your decor, and it comes housed inside a ceramic pot for easy display. Best of all, the artificial construction means it requires no watering or pruning to maintain its appearance year-round.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
